name: Filling Set for 40 Dosing Capsules
summary: Maximise your filling efficiency by using the Filling Set for 40 Dosing Capsules.
description: Maximise your filling efficiency by using the Filling Set for 40 Dosing Capsules. A slider method is used to distribute your herbs evenly into all 40 capsules, while scales and a grinder aid in precise dosing and grinding. Easily close the capsules with the help of the pestle, and conveniently store up to 8 at a time with the included magazine. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
